name: live-edge-3d-probe
description: Combined 3D Live Edge Mesh + Surface Mesh Probe for ncSender

scripts.test:all: npm run test:index && npm run test:existing
scripts.test:index: npm run test:bounds && npm run test:interpolation && npm run test:compensation && npm run test:persistence
scripts.test:existing: npm run test:face-probe && npm run test:outline && npm run test:viz && npm run test:mesh && npm run test:preflight && npm run test:sequence && npm run test:stl
